name: Nutex Health Inc.
business: Nutex Health Inc. is a physician-led healthcare services company with 26 hospital facilities in 12 states and a population health management division. The hospital division operates micro-hospitals, specialty hospitals, and hospital outpatient departments. The population health management division owns and manages provider networks such as independent physician associations (IPAs).

exposures.sentence: Effective May 1, 2024, we engaged HaloMD, a third-party tech-enabled expert, to further support our out-of-network claims and determine which claims would be beneficial to arbitrate.
We generally operate as an out-of-network provider and, as such, do not have negotiated reimbursement rates with most insurance companies.

catalysts.event: Open three new hospital facilities by end of 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to open three new hospital facilities by the end of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Hospital care expenditures increased 9.2% from the previous year and totaled about $1.7 trillion.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2024, hospital care expenditures increased 9.2% from the previous year and totaled about $1.7 trillion.

tamClaims.claim: CMS projects hospital services category growth at 5.5% annually from 2028 through 2033, reaching nearly $2.7 trillion by 2033.
tamClaims.sentence: CMS projects that the hospital services category will grow at an average of 5.5% annually from 2028 through 2033, reaching nearly $2.7 trillion by 2033.

tamClaims.claim: National healthcare expenditures grew 7.2% in 2024 to $5.3 trillion.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services, or CMS, national healthcare expenditures grew 7.2% in 2024 to $5.3 trillion.
